title: Fix P1-1/P1-2/P1-3: anchor the tier marker, harden fail-open, cover Task
action: Fix the three code-level P1 clusters from review-findings.md, red-first per cluster (add/modify the failing test row FIRST, record its failure, then fix): (P1-1 anchor) replace the unanchored marker search: the marker satisfies the transport ONLY when it is the FIRST non-whitespace token of tool_input.prompt, OR tool_input.description STARTS with it (leading whitespace allowed, case-insensitive, same tier vocabulary). Delete the 500-char window logic. Update existing rows 3/4/5/6/7: head-of-prompt marker allowed; description-start marker allowed; NEW negative rows: marker embedded after any other prompt text (e.g. at char 100) DENIED, marker mid-description DENIED. (P1-2 fail-open) normalize the parsed payload before ANY property access: non-object/null/array payload -> exit 0 empty stderr; accept payload.cwd only when a non-empty string, else fall back to process.cwd(); move root resolution inside the try/catch so ANY throw lands in logCrash + exit 0. NEW rows: stdin 'null' -> exit 0 empty stderr; array payload -> exit 0; cwd as object -> exit 0 (still evaluates the dispatch using process.cwd()); fixture repo whose .bee/bin/lib/state.mjs throws on import -> exit 0, empty stderr, one parseable model-guard crash line in that fixture's .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl. (P1-3 Task) table-drive the tool-name dimension: run the bare-deny and the model-param-allow and the anchored-marker-allow rows for BOTH tool_name Agent and Task.

truths: A marker occurring anywhere except prompt-head or description-start NEVER satisfies the transport — proven by at least two negative rows (embedded prompt, mid-description)
echo null | node hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs exits 0 with empty stderr (was: uncaught TypeError exit 1 — the recorded red)
A throwing vendored state.mjs yields exit 0 + a crash record, never a nonzero exit that would block every dispatch
Bare Task dispatch is denied and explicit-tier Task dispatch is allowed, same as Agent
The FIX line and deny-log event contract from cell 1 are unchanged (bee-tier + FIX + generation model in stderr; deny event fields intact)
prohibitions: No changes outside the two listed files (0023/skill wording is cell 7; vendored copy re-sync is cell 7)
No weakening of any existing passing row
No new marker vocabulary or tiers

trace.outcome: Fixed P1-1/P1-2/P1-3 from review-findings.md in hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs + hooks/test_model_guard.mjs: (P1-1) replaced the unanchored 500-char marker scan with an anchor rule — [bee-tier: <tier>] only counts at the first non-whitespace token of prompt or the start of description; deleted PROMPT_WINDOW; added negative rows for embedded-in-prompt (char~100) and mid-description markers, plus a long-tail positive row proving the window is truly gone. (P1-2) normalized the payload to a plain object before any property access (null/array top-level payload -> exit 0 empty stderr), normalized cwd to a non-empty string or process.cwd() fallback, and moved root resolution inside the try/catch so any throw (including a throwing vendored state.mjs) lands in logCrash + exit 0; added a throwing-state.mjs fixture proving the crash record lands in that fixture's own hooks.jsonl. (P1-3) table-drove bare-deny/model-allow/marker-allow across both tool_name Agent and Task. Deny-message contract (bee-tier+FIX+generation model) and deny-log event fields unchanged; all existing passing rows preserved.

    "hooks/test_model_guard.mjs row18 (new) + buildThrowingStateFixture(): a fixture whose vendored state.mjs throws on import -> exit 0, empty stderr, one parseable model-guard crash line in that fixture's own .bee/logs/hooks.jsonl",

  "red_failure_evidence": "Reproduced BEFORE any fix, against the pre-change hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs (git show fc65f4e:hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs): (1) P1-2 — `echo null | node hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs` -> uncaught TypeError 'Cannot read properties of null (reading cwd)' at bee-model-guard.mjs:106, exit 1 (contract requires exit 0 fail-open). (2) P1-1 — a prompt with 100 chars of filler then '[bee-tier: generation]' embedded mid-prompt -> exit 0 (ALLOWED); expected DENIED after anchoring. (3) P1-1 — a description with text before an embedded '[bee-tier: generation]' marker -> exit 0 (ALLOWED); expected DENIED. All three reproduced via direct spawnSync calls against the hook binary before any edit, matching the cell's 'Confirmed reds' list.",
  "verification_run": "node hooks/test_model_guard.mjs -> 42/42 checks 'ok', ALL PASS, exit 0 (includes the 3 reds above now passing plus P1-3 Agent/Task table rows); node skills/bee-hive/templates/tests/test_lib.mjs -> 124 passed, 0 failed, exit 0. Combined command from the cell's verify field run and recorded via bee_cells.mjs verify.",
  "deliberate_exceptions": ["P1-3 had no behavior red to reproduce: DISPATCH_TOOLS already included Task pre-fix (git show fc65f4e:hooks/bee-model-guard.mjs:19), so the fix is coverage-only (table-driving the existing correct behavior across both tool names) — the 'before' is the absence of any Task row in hooks/test_model_guard.mjs pre-fix, confirmed by grep."]
}
